AutoMAX
  • CLI Overrides
  • View page source

CLI Overrides

The following training fields can be overridden directly on the command line. CLI values always take precedence over the config file.

python -m src.auto_trainer \
  --config_file config.yaml \
  --epochs 50 \
  --seed 0 \
  --output_path ./runs

Reference

CLI flag

Config field

Type

--epochs

training.epochs

int

--batch_size

training.batch_size

int

--eval_batch_size

training.eval_batch_size

int

--sampling_rate

training.sampling_rate

float

--num_workers

training.num_workers

int

--output_path

training.output_path

string

--seed

training.SEED

int

--resume / --no-resume

training.resume_from_checkpoint

bool

--save_checkpoint_every

training.save_checkpoint_every

int
